    Gets the JSON document of this GlbImage.
    GetLogicalChildren()

    Gets a collection of ExtraProperties instances stored by this object.
    GetSatellitePaths(string)

    Gets the list of satellite / dependency files for a given glTF file. This includes binary blobs and texture images.
    IsolateMemory()

    Refreshes all internal memory buffers.
    Load(Stream, ReadSettings)
    LoadGlbImage(string, ReadSettings)

    Reads a GlbImage instance from a path pointing to a GLB or a GLTF file
    MergeBuffers()

    Merges all the instances into a single big one.
    MergeBuffers(int)

    Merges all the instances into buffers of maxSize size.
    MergeImages()

    Transfers all the content into BufferView instances

    OnValidateReferences(ValidationContext)
    ParseGLB(ArraySegment<byte>, ReadSettings)

    Parses a GlbImage instance from a byte array representing a GLB file

    Reads a GlbImage instance from a Stream representing a GLB file
    Save(string, WriteSettings)

    Writes this GlbImage to a file in GLTF or GLB based on the extension of filePath.

    Writes this GlbImage to a file in GLB format.

    Writes this GlbImage to a file in GLTF format.
